## beehiiv poll-responses list

List poll responses <Badge intent="info" minimal outlined>OAuth Scope: polls:read</Badge>

### Synopsis

List poll responses <Badge intent="info" minimal outlined>OAuth Scope: polls:read</Badge>

Retrieve all individual subscriber responses for a specific poll with cursor-based pagination. Use this endpoint for large datasets instead of the `expand[]=poll_responses` parameter on the poll show endpoint.

API path: /publications/{publicationId}/polls/{pollId}/responses

```
beehiiv poll-responses list <pollId> [flags]
```

### Options

```
      --all                 Fetch every page and aggregate the results
  -h, --help                help for list
      --query stringArray   Add a repeatable query parameter in key=value form
```

      --rate-limit-rpm int      Override the internal rate limit
      --raw                     Shorthand for --output raw
      --table                   Shorthand for --output table
      --timeout string          Override the request timeout, e.g. 45s
      --verbose                 Print request and response details to stderr
